# rnxORM

A lightweight TypeScript ORM for **PostgreSQL**, **SQL Server**, and **MariaDB/MySQL**, inspired by Entity Framework Core.

## Features

- **Multi-Database**: PostgreSQL, SQL Server (MSSQL), MariaDB/MySQL via provider pattern
- **Decorators**: `@Entity`, `@Column`, `@PrimaryKey`, `@Index`, `@Unique`
- **Relationships**: `@ManyToOne`, `@OneToMany`, `@ManyToMany`, `@OneToOne`
- **Change Tracking & SaveChanges()**: EF Core-style automatic change detection
- **Fluent API / ModelBuilder**: Configure entities programmatically via `onModelCreating()`
- **Eager Loading**: `.include()` to load related entities
- **Data Seeding**: `hasData()` for initial data population
- **Migrations**: Version-controlled schema changes with `MigrationBuilder` and `Migrator`
- **LINQ-Style Queries**: `sum`, `average`, `min`, `max`, `distinct`, `groupBy`, `select`
- **Raw SQL**: `fromSqlRaw()` and `executeSqlRaw()`
- **Global Query Filters**: Automatic filtering for soft deletes, multi-tenancy
- **Value Converters**: Transform values between entity and database representations
- **Shadow Properties**: Database-only columns without entity properties
- **Concurrency Tokens**: Optimistic concurrency control
- **Owned Entity Types**: Value objects via `ownsOne()` and `ownsMany()`
- **Keyless Entity Types**: Map database views via `hasNoKey()`
- **Bulk Operations**: `addRange`, `updateRange`, `removeRange`
- **Schema Evolution**: Auto-detect and migrate schema changes
- **Query Optimization**: `.asNoTracking()` for read-only queries

## Installation

```bash
# PostgreSQL
npm install rnxorm pg reflect-metadata

# SQL Server
npm install rnxorm mssql reflect-metadata

# MariaDB/MySQL
npm install rnxorm mariadb reflect-metadata
```

## Usage Example

```typescript
import { Entity, Column, PrimaryKey, DbContext, PostgreSQLProvider } from "rnxorm";

@Entity("users")
class User {
  @PrimaryKey() id!: number;
  @Column() name!: string;
  @Column() age!: number;
}

const db = new DbContext(new PostgreSQLProvider({
  host: "localhost",
  port: 5432,
  user: "postgres",
  password: "password",
  database: "mydb",
}));

async function main() {
  await db.connect();
  await db.ensureCreated();

  const users = db.set(User);

  // Create
  const user = new User();
  user.name = "Alice";
  user.age = 30;
  users.add(user);
  await db.saveChanges();

  // Read
  const allUsers = await users.toList();
  const alice = await users.where("name", "=", "Alice").first();

  // Update
  if (alice) {
    alice.age = 31;
    await db.saveChanges();
  }

  // Delete
  if (alice) {
    users.remove(alice);
    await db.saveChanges();
  }

  await db.disconnect();
}
```

## Database Providers

```typescript
import { PostgreSQLProvider, MSSQLProvider, MariaDBProvider } from "rnxorm";

// PostgreSQL
new DbContext(new PostgreSQLProvider({ host, port, user, password, database }));

// SQL Server
new DbContext(new MSSQLProvider({ host, port, user, password, database }));

// MariaDB/MySQL
new DbContext(new MariaDBProvider({ host, port, user, password, database }));
```

Each provider implements `IDatabaseProvider` with a `getDialect()` method returning `'postgresql'`, `'mssql'`, or `'mariadb'`.

## API Reference

### DbContext
- `connect()` / `disconnect()`: Manage database connections
- `ensureCreated()`: Create/update schema, indexes, foreign keys, seed data
- `set(Entity)`: Get a `DbSet<T>` for the given entity class
- `saveChanges()`: Persist all tracked changes in a single transaction
- `attach(entity, state)`: Attach an external entity with a given state
- `entry(entity)`: Get the `EntityEntry` for a tracked entity
- `executeSqlRaw(sql, params)`: Execute raw SQL (UPDATE, DELETE, etc.)

### DbSet<T>
- `add(entity)` / `addRange(entities)`: Track entities for insertion
- `update(entity)` / `updateRange(entities)`: Track entities for update
- `remove(entity)` / `removeRange(entities)`: Track entities for deletion
- `find(id)`: Find by primary key
- `toList()`: Execute query and return all results
- `first()` / `firstOrThrow()`: Get first result
- `single()` / `singleOrDefault()`: Get exactly one result
- `count()`: Count matching entities
- `where(col, op, val)`: Filter entities
- `orderBy(col)` / `orderByDescending(col)`: Sort results
- `skip(n)` / `take(n)`: Pagination
- `include(selector)`: Eager load related entities
- `select(selector)`: Project to a different shape
- `groupBy(selector)`: Group results
- `distinct()`: Remove duplicates
- `sum(selector)` / `average(selector)` / `min(selector)` / `max(selector)`: Aggregations
- `asNoTracking()`: Return frozen read-only entities
- `ignoreQueryFilters()`: Bypass global query filters
- `fromSqlRaw(sql, params)`: Execute raw SQL mapped to entity type

### ModelBuilder (Fluent API)
- `entity(Class).toTable(name)`: Set table name
- `.hasKey(selector)`: Set primary key
- `.hasIndex(selector)` / `.hasCompositeIndex(selectors)`: Add indexes
- `.hasUnique(selector)`: Add unique constraint
- `.hasData(seedArray)`: Seed initial data
- `.hasQueryFilter(predicate)`: Add global query filter
- `.hasNoKey()`: Mark as keyless entity
- `.ownsOne(selector, Type)` / `.ownsMany(selector, Type)`: Configure owned entities
- `.shadowProperty(name, type, options)`: Add database-only column
- `.property(selector)`: Configure a property
  - `.isRequired()` / `.isOptional()`: Nullability
  - `.hasMaxLength(n)`: Max string length
  - `.hasColumnName(name)` / `.hasColumnType(type)`: Column mapping
  - `.hasDefaultValue(val)`: Default value
  - `.hasComputedColumnSql(sql)`: Computed column
  - `.hasConversion(toDB, fromDB)`: Value converter
  - `.isConcurrencyToken()`: Optimistic concurrency

### Relationships (Decorators)
- `@ManyToOne(() => Type, inverse)`: Many-to-one relationship
- `@OneToMany(() => Type, inverse)`: One-to-many relationship
- `@ManyToMany(() => Type, inverse, { joinTable, joinColumn, inverseJoinColumn })`: Many-to-many
- `@OneToOne(() => Type, inverse)`: One-to-one relationship

### Migrations
- `Migrator.addMigration(migration)` / `.addMigrations(array)`: Register migrations
- `Migrator.migrate()`: Apply all pending migrations
- `Migrator.revert()`: Revert last migration
- `Migrator.revertTo(id)`: Revert to a specific migration
- `Migrator.status()`: Show migration status
- `MigrationBuilder`: Fluent API for schema operations
  - `.createTable(name, columns)` / `.dropTable(name)`
  - `.addColumn(table, name, type)` / `.dropColumn(table, name)`
  - `.alterColumn(table, name, type)` / `.renameColumn(table, old, new)`
  - `.createIndex(table, name, columns, unique)` / `.dropIndex(table, name)`
  - `.addForeignKey(table, name, col, refTable, refCol, onDelete)`
  - `.sql(rawSql, params)`: Execute raw SQL in migration

### Testing
- `MetadataStorage.reset()`: Clear all entity metadata for test isolation
- `MockDatabaseProvider`: In-memory provider for unit testing (in test/mocks/)
